Name: Viewpoint School
Tagline: Transitional Kindergarten (TK) through Twelfth Grade Independent School in Calabasas, California.
About: These words are the centerpiece of our mission, vision, and values and our world ready promise. Building on more than six decades of excellence, we dedicate ourselves to the ideals and drivers of exceptional future readiness.
Philosophy: We invite you and your family to discover a school where tradition connects us and innovation propels us. Explore the school’s programs and you will find endless ways for students to engage in new and favorite activities and subjects with a breadth of offerings to challenge children and develop their talents and interests.
Outcomes: Viewpoint School graduates are accepted into top-tier universities such as Stanford, Harvard, and UCLA. Students consistently achieve high scores in Advanced Placement exams and participate in nationally recognized arts and athletics programs.
Admissions: We’re delighted to work with you and encourage you to give us a call at 818-591-6560, or email us at admission@viewpoint.org. We’ll get back to you promptly.
Quote: Empowering students to thrive as compassionate leaders and innovative thinkers in an ever-changing world.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: At Viewpoint, a premier independent school in the Los Angeles area, we offer more than an exceptional TK–12 education — we give families peace of mind. Our campus is protected by one of the most advanced Safety and Security programs in the independent school world with 24/7, 365-day coverage.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Highly trained, armed Campus Safety Officers serve as first responders, supported by industry-leading standards and multiple layers of protection to keep our community safe.
Performance.Academic Integration: Viewpoint School offers a rigorous curriculum with specialized courses in STEM, humanities, and the arts, including Advanced Placement and honors classes. The school emphasizes experiential learning through project-based assignments and interdisciplinary studies.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from Viewpoint School are regularly accepted into prestigious universities like Stanford and Harvard, reflecting their strong academic preparation. Students have also achieved national recognition in arts and athletics competitions.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including a performing arts center, science labs, and an Olympic-sized swimming pool. Students benefit from well-equipped art studios and a comprehensive athletic complex.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Viewpoint School employs a robust assessment system with regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences. The school ensures continuous feedback through digital platforms, facilitating transparent communication with families.
